steps.t: Sigênik is prepared to administer his test. Speak to him when you are prepared.
Sigênik awaits your response. He asked if Igbâl is the Elder who directly supports the rebellion in Jirush. You should give him your response.
You provided your answer to Sigênik's question about Igbâl. Speak with him again to continue your test.
